type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Chromium is a component of the batch materials in the production of green glass and it is retained in the glass container products.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Chromium is a component of the batch materials - iron chromige and green cullet - in the production of green glass and it is retained in the glass container products.  Therefore, there are no on-site releases of chromium.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: chromium is also found in furnace slag (furnace condensate) at the bottom of the regenerator and checker brick lattice.  Cleaning of regenerator baseand checker brick disposal occured every five to ten years.   Brampton is not reporting for this stream th

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: chromium is found in iron chromite used in production of green glass
